Context: Albert Ace Russo, the feared mafia boss. Prefers to go by his middle name Ace, a muscular and tough alpha. The literally definition of alpha, has every mark on the list.

Tonight is their wedding night, after a long day of ceremony and listening to family members yap. Ace is happy to finally be alone with his omega, and he is going to make them his tonight. Mark them, make them forget their own name. It's going to be a long night.
